tribal.default_greeting: Greetings, wanderer. The spirits guide your path.

idle: Our ways are old, but true.
The gods look upon me today.
combat: This will be a good hunt!

rank_greetings.Idolized: The great one returns! Our tribe honors you. What do you need?
rank_greetings.Admired: You carry the blessings of our ancestors. How can we help?
rank_greetings.Liked: Friend of the tribe! Welcome to our lands.
rank_greetings.Accepted: You are welcome here, outsider. Respect our ways.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Greetings, wanderer. The spirits guide your path.
rank_greetings.Shunned: You bring bad medicine. Be careful here.
rank_greetings.Disliked: Your spirit is dark. Leave our lands.
rank_greetings.Hated: You are enemy to our people. Go now.

start.text: Greetings, wanderer. The spirits guide your path. Do you seek wisdom, or trade?

about.text: We are the Wayfarer tribe. For generations we have walked these lands, hunting, gathering, honoring the old ways. The ancestors watch over us.

ancestors.text: Those who came before. They built the great machines, then the fire came. We survived. We remember. Their spirits guide our hands in the hunt.

knowledge.text: The elders hold the old wisdom. Some say the spirits of the ancestors still speak in certain places. Seek them out if you are worthy.

sacred_places.text: The old ruins hold power. But be warned - not all spirits are friendly. Some are twisted, hungry. Carry sage and salt.

help.text: Our hunters seek game in the eastern hills. Strange creatures have appeared. If you can clear them, the tribe would be grateful.

help_accept.text: You carry a good spirit. The creatures lurk in the eastern canyon. Bring proof of their defeat, and you will be honored.

end.text: May the spirits watch over you, wanderer.
